name: Faceless YouTube Shorts — Daily Autopilot (Groq + SamAutomation)

parameters.content:
## Faceless YouTube Shorts - Daily Autopilot

Fully automated pipeline that generates and uploads 1 faceless YouTube Short per day. Zero camera, zero editing, zero manual work.

Pipeline: Schedule (10 AM daily) - Groq topic - Groq script - SamAutomation (AI images + TTS + subtitles + render) -YouTube upload - Google Sheets tracking

Monthly cost: ~$33 (SamAutomation plan). Groq and YouTube API are free.

SamAutomation handles AI image generation (Flux), voiceover (TTS), AutoCaptions, and video rendering- all in one API call.

### AI Script Engine

Generate Topics - Groq LLaMA generates 3 unique topic ideas with hooks, angles, and target emotions. Parse Topic picks the first one.

Log Topic - Saves the selected topic to your Google Sheet "Topic Bank" tab with today's date and status "scripting". Helps you track what has been posted and avoid repeats.

Write Script - Groq writes the full voiceover script with scene-by-scene image descriptions, plus YouTube title, description, 15 tags, and hashtags. Each scene has a "narration" field for the voiceover and a "description" field for AI image generation.

Customization: Change your niche and sub-niche directly in the Google Sheet Config tab. No workflow editing needed. Voice options: en-US-ChristopherNeural (deep, default), en-US-GuyNeural (calm), en-GB-RyanNeural (British), en-US-JennyNeural (female).

### Video Rendering - SamAutomation

Build Video Payload - Converts the script into a SamAutomation render payload. Each scene gets:

- AI-generated image via Flux model (1080x1920, photorealistic, cinematic)
- TTS voiceover using Microsoft Neural voice
- Word-level animated subtitles (Montserrat Bold, white + black outline)

No external image API needed. SamAutomation generates images, adds voice, burns subtitles, and renders the final MP4 — all in one API call.

Render + Poll — SamAutomation renders the video in the cloud, usually 30-60 seconds. The polling loop checks every 15 seconds until status is "done". Once ready, the hosted MP4 URL passes to YouTube upload.

### YouTube Upload + Tracking

Upload - Posts the rendered video to YouTube with AI-generated title, description, tags, and category. Privacy is set to public by default. Change to "private" or "unlisted" in the Upload to YouTube node if you want to review before publishing.

Topic Bank - Google Sheet automatically updates the topic status from "scripting" to "published" with a timestamp after successful upload. Use this to track your content calendar and spot repeats.

Schedule - Runs at 10 AM daily. Each run generates a fresh topic and publishes one Short. 30 Shorts per month stays well within SamAutomation's 50 render limit.

Rate limits: YouTube allows ~6 uploads/day, Groq gives 14,400 requests/day, SamAutomation gives 50 renders + ~245 AI generations per month. At 1 Short/day you are well within all limits.

## Credentials needed :
1. Groq API Key - Header Auth, name: Authorization, value: Bearer YOUR_KEY (free at console.groq.com)
2. SamAutomation API Key - Header Auth, name: X-API-Key, value: YOUR_KEY (from samautomation.work/register)
3. Google Sheets - OAuth2, connect your Google account
4. YouTube Upload - OAuth2, enable YouTube Data API v3 in Google Cloud, scopes: youtube.upload + youtube

### Google Sheet setup:
Create one Google Sheet with 2 tabs.
Tab 1 "Config" - columns: selected_niche, selected_sub_niche, voice_id
Tab 2 "Topic Bank" - columns: date, niche, topic_title, hook_line, angle, target_emotion, status, published_at

Paste your Sheet URL into all 3 Google Sheets nodes (Read Config, Log Topic, Update Topic Bank).
